postinstall.command:
apk add --no-cache wget binutils
WARP_DEB=$(wget -qO- 'https://pkg.cloudflareclient.com/dists/bookworm/main/binary-arm64/Packages' | grep '^Filename:' | tail -1 | cut -d' ' -f2)
[ -n "$WARP_DEB" ]
cd /tmp
wget -q "https://pkg.cloudflareclient.com/$WARP_DEB" -O warp.deb
ar x warp.deb
tar xf data.tar.* -C /
rm -f warp.deb data.tar.* control.tar.* debian-binary
apk del binutils
mkdir -p /var/lib/cloudflare-warp /var/log/cloudflare-warp
test -x /bin/warp-cli
